"Ye Are the Salt of the Earth." (Matt. 5:13.) In an age without refrigerators, salt was the great preservative. In a memorable metaphor, Jesus calls his disciples salt: they would preserve his teachings and life-style among the peoples of the earth, but if they lost their conscientiousness in following his example, they would be worthless in his kingdom and would be cast out, as useless salt is…
